sequenceDiagram
    participant A
    participant B
    A->>B: Solid filled
    A-->>B: Dotted filled
    A->B: Solid open
    A-->B: Dotted open
    A-xB: Solid cross
    A--xB: Dotted cross
    A-)B: Solid async
    A--)B: Dotted async
---
+---+     +---+
| A |     | B |
+-+-+     +-+-+
  |         |
  | Solid filled
  +-------->|
  |         |
  | Dotted filled
  +........>|
  |         |
  | Solid open
  +-------->|
  |         |
  | Dotted open
  +........>|
  |         |
  | Solid cross
  +--------x|
  |         |
  | Dotted cross
  +........x|
  |         |
  | Solid async
  +--------)|
  |         |
  | Dotted async
  +........)|
  |         |
